let M := fun i ω ↦ μ[|X n| + |X 0| | (hτ i).measurableSpace] ω
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated (Y := fun i ↦ M i) ?_ ?_ ?_
  · exact (((uniformIntegrable_subsingleton (f := fun _ : Unit ↦ |X n| + |X 0|) le_rfl (by simp)
      (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <| (hX.integrable n).abs.add (hX.integrable 0).abs)).condExp'
      (fun i ↦ (hτ i).measurableSpace_le)).comp (fun i ↦ ((), i)))
  · exact fun i ↦ stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le hX.stronglyMeasurable (hτ i) hτ_le
      |>.aestronglyMeasurable
  · intro i
    refine ⟨i, ?_⟩
    filter_upwards [hX.stoppedValue_le_condExp_of_le (isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 n) (hτ i) (hτ_le i)
      (fun _ ↦ le_rfl), hX.condExp_stoppedValue_ge (isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 0) (hτ i) bot_le (hτ_le i)] with ω h₁ h₂
    rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_le]
    constructor
    · calc _ ≤ μ[X n | (hτ i).measurableSpace] ω := h₁
        _ ≤ μ[|X n| | (hτ i).measurableSpace] ω := condExp_mono (hX.integrable n)
          ((hX.integrable n).abs) (fun _ ↦ le_abs_self _)
        _ ≤ M i ω := by
          simp only [M]
          rw [condExp_add (hX.integrable n).abs (hX.integrable 0).abs]
          exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (condExp_nonneg (fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _))
    · calc -M i ω ≤ -μ[|X 0| | (hτ i).measurableSpace] ω := by
        simp only [M, condExp_add (hX.integrable n).abs (hX.integrable 0).abs]
        exact neg_le_neg (le_add_of_nonneg_left (condExp_nonneg (fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _)))
      _ ≤ μ[X 0 | (hτ i).measurableSpace] ω := by
        rw [neg_le, ← condExp_neg]
        exact condExp_mono (hX.integrable 0).neg (hX.integrable 0).abs (fun _ ↦ neg_le_abs_self _)
      _ ≤ stoppedValue X (τ i) ω := h₂

haveI : IsFiniteMeasure μ := hX.isFiniteMeasure
  let M_n := (μ[X n | 𝓕 n.measurableSpace] : Ω → ℝ)
  let M_0 := (μ[X 0 | 𝓕 0.measurableSpace] : Ω → ℝ)
  uniformIntegrable_of_dominated (κ := ℕ × ℕ)
    ((uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <|
      (hX.integrable n).add (hX.integrable 0))).condExp' (fun i ↦ (hτ i).measurableSpace_le))
    (fun i ↦ (hX.stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue (hτ i)).aestronglyMeasurable)
    (fun i ↦ ⟨(0, i), by
      filter_upwards [stoppedValue_le_condExp_of_le hX (isStoppingTime_const _ n) (hτ i) (hτ_le i) (fun _ ↦ le_rfl),
        stoppedValue_ae_eq_condExp_of_le hX.martingale (isStoppingTime_const _ n) (hτ i) (hτ_le i) (fun _ ↦ le_rfl)]
      with ω hXτ hMτ
      simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_le]
      refine ⟨hXτ.trans (le_abs_self _), ?_⟩
      rw [hMτ]
      exact (condExp_mono (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (hX.memLp n))
        (memLp_one_iff_integrable.1 (hX.memLp 0)) (hX.le_condExp (bot_le : 0 ≤ n))).symm.trans
        (neg_le_condExp (hX.integrable n) |>.trans (condExp_mono (hX.integrable n).neg
        (hX.integrable 0).neg (neg_le_neg (hX.le_condExp bot_le))))⟩)

        rw [stoppedValue_const, condExp_abs]
        exact le_abs_self _⟩)
